sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 3.2 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.3)

statement.latex: Classify the faithful irreducible (infinite-dimensional) representations of the nilpotent group defined by generators$a,b,c$and relations$[a,b]=c$,$ac=ca$,$bc=cb$. (A condition for a representation to be monomial is given in (A.\,E.\,Zalesski , Math. Notes, 9 (1971), 117--123).) %Mat. Zametki 9(1971), 199--210).) { S.\,D.\,Berman, A.\,E.\,Zalesski } Classification of these representations up to eq...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
